message:
Add integration layer stubs and project scaffolding

Four crates forming the top of the dependency graph — the integration
engine, public API facade, CLI shell, and conformance test harness —
plus empty placeholder directories for benchmarks, conformance tests,
and integration tests.

fsqlite-core (Core Engine Integration):
- Will wire together all lower layers: connection management, statement
  preparation, schema tracking, DDL/DML code generation
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-vfs, fsqlite-pager,
  fsqlite-wal, fsqlite-mvcc, fsqlite-btree, fsqlite-ast, fsqlite-parser,
  fsqlite-planner, fsqlite-vdbe, fsqlite-func
- The central integration point that no other internal crate depends on

fsqlite (Public API Facade):
- Will expose the user-facing Connection, Statement, Row, and Value types
- Deps: fsqlite-types, fsqlite-error, fsqlite-core
- Thin wrapper providing ergonomic Rust API (prepare/execute/query)

fsqlite-cli (Interactive SQL Shell):
- Binary crate with main.rs entry point
- Will provide an interactive REPL similar to sqlite3 CLI
- Deps: fsqlite, fsqlite-error

fsqlite-harness (Conformance Test Runner):
- Will run SQLite's test suite against FrankenSQLite and compare output
  against golden files for format compatibility verification
- Deps: fsqlite, fsqlite-error

Scaffolding:
- benches/.gitkeep: placeholder for criterion benchmarks
- conformance/.gitkeep: placeholder for SQLite compatibility test fixtures
- tests/.gitkeep: placeholder for workspace-level integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+[package]
+name = "fsqlite-cli"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Interactive SQL shell"
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fsqlite"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fsqlite = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@

+edition.workspace = true

+rust-version.workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fsqlite = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

+description = "Public API facade"

+[dependencies]

+fsqlite-error = { workspace = true }
+fsqlite-core = { workspace = true }
